summary: Script quality is strong (4-5): solid error handling, type hints, glob logic, docstrings. WORKFLOW CRITICAL FAILURE: Task mandates TDD (test-first), all tests run via act, act-result.txt artifact with validated output. Delivered: no test file, no act-result.txt generation, pytest installed but never used, manual fixture echoes with zero assertions. Workflow steps 4-6 run script but don't validate output (should parse and assert exact values per requirement §2). Actions not SHA-pinned (requirement 3: pinned refs). Violates core requirement: 'Test harness must parse act output and assert on EXACT EXPECTED VALUES.' Incomplete deliverable.
